title: Fidacy A2A Trust-Verdict Extension — Agent Card Declaration
description: The AgentExtension object an agent places in AgentCapabilities.extensions[] to declare it carries a Fidacy trust verdict. The verdict itself rides in the existing containers: AP2 risk_data (risk-data.schema.json) or A2A Task.metadata (a2a-metadata.schema.json), whose source of truth is the signed EdDSA vc_jws. This schema validates the DECLARATION only.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what the extension carries.

required.description: Whether a client MUST support the extension to interact. Fidacy's is opt-in, so false.

issuer.description: Fidacy's did:web identity (bare DID; the signing kid appears in the payload issuer claim).

jwks_uri.description: Public JWKS where the active signing key is published.

trust_list_uri.description: Signed registry of currently active key ids.
